title: Night Train to Munich
writer: Gordon Wellesley, Sidney Gilliat, Frank Launder
actors: Margaret Lockwood, Rex Harrison, Paul Henreid
plot: After Germany invades Czechia, the German and the British intelligence services try to capture Czech scientist Dr. Axel Bomasch (James Harcourt), inventor of a new type of armor-plating.
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 4 wins & 3 nominations total
